subject: tensorflow error when particle picking
body:
Hello I have a windows laptop with these specs

Processor Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-9750H CPU @ 2.60GHz   2.60 GHz
Installed RAM 32.0 GB (31.8 GB usable)
Device ID C7DFC50F-AE3A-4D98-8B8C-0790472B6BEF
Product ID 00325-81709-59805-AAOEM
System type 64-bit operating system, x64-based processor
1X Nvidia GeForce GTX 1660 Ti

I installed WARP 1.09 on it and everything ran except for particle picking. 
I get the error message in the screenshot.
